business_name: National Commercial Printing Services Provider (anonymous broker listing)
industry: Printing — commercial printing & direct mail services
detail: National general printing company — stationery, brochures, flyers, postcards, signage; national + local direct mailing services. Adjusted EBITDA grew at a 30.6% CAGR from 2021 through TTM Oct 31 2025. From 2022 through TTM Oct 2025, operating income growth outpaced gross profit growth (improved operational efficiency). Purchased a new state-of-the-art large-format digital printing press in cash in Q1 2025. Named to the Inc. Power Partner list 2025.
